error_signature: Kanban component not stacking by integer field
title: Kanban component fails to stack by integer field
symptom: The Kanban component does not function properly when stacking elements by an integer field, such as 'Batch'. It works correctly with text fields like 'Status'.
not_this_if: Stacking by a text field works correctly
root_cause: The issue arises because the Kanban component may be treating integer values as strings, which can lead to improper stacking behavior. This occurs when the integer '0' is interpreted as the string '0', causing confusion in the stacking logic.
fix_steps: Bind the stack to an array of objects, where each object contains a unique integer as a value and a corresponding label.
Ensure that the integer values are passed correctly without being converted to strings.
agent_instruction: Bind the Kanban stack to an array of objects with unique integers to resolve the stacking issue.
